title: batch-初中数学史讲解员-010
initialPrompt: 请开始这次单场景教学问答。
studentInitialQuestion: I'm DavisNora, a senior high student into vocal music and economics research. I usually prefer solo projects and creative makeup over group work because I feel a bit socially alienated at school. Can you give me a complete analysis of how mathematical thinking has evolved from ancient times to today? I'm particularly interested in how math influences economics and the arts. Please include stories of innovative mathematicians, talk about the value of mathematical logic for introverted students, and give me advice on balancing my artistic interests with academic performance.
